name: hello
description: Enthusiastic wave greeting, excited or happy welcome

name: idle1
description: Subtle weight shift, neutral breathing variation

name: idle2
description: Gentle relaxed sway, calm and at ease

name: idle3pause
description: Still thoughtful pause, quietly contemplating or listening carefully

name: idle4pause
description: Longer reflective pause, concerned, uncertain, or deep in thought

name: picked_up
description: Startled reaction, suddenly surprised or caught off guard

name: point longer
description: Extended sustained point, emphasising something important or explaining at length

name: point2
description: Quick confident point gesture, directing attention

name: pointing2sec
description: Brief teasing point, light playful jab or cheeky comment
